Elastic Cloud Server.name: Elastic Cloud Server
Elastic Cloud Server.short_description: Elastic Cloud Server provides scalable, secure, and on-demand cloud computing resources for running applications and workloads on Huawei Cloud.
Elastic Cloud Server.definition: Elastic Cloud Server is a cloud-based virtual server service that allows customers to provision compute resources such as vCPU, memory, operating system, storage, and network connectivity based on business requirements.
details: Elastic Cloud Server supports flexible compute configurations for enterprise applications, web platforms, development environments, and production workloads.
It integrates with Huawei Cloud networking, storage, security, monitoring, and backup services.
Customers can scale compute capacity based on workload requirements and business growth.
key_benefits: Integration with VPC, EVS, EIP, security groups, and monitoring
Support for Linux and Windows operating systems
Suitable for production, development, testing, and migration workloads
typical_use_cases: Backend compute layer for business systems
Elastic Cloud Server.proposal_positioning: Elastic Cloud Server is proposed as the primary compute layer for hosting the customer's workloads on Huawei Cloud.

Elastic Volume Service.name: Elastic Volume Service
Elastic Volume Service.short_description: Elastic Volume Service provides persistent block storage for Huawei Cloud compute workloads.
Elastic Volume Service.definition: Elastic Volume Service is a scalable block storage service that can be attached to cloud servers to provide persistent storage for operating systems, applications, and data.
details: Elastic Volume Service provides reliable block-level storage for Elastic Cloud Server instances.
It supports different disk types and performance options based on workload requirements.
EVS volumes can be used for system disks, data disks, databases, enterprise applications, and file storage workloads.
Elastic Volume Service.proposal_positioning: Elastic Volume Service is proposed as the persistent storage layer for the customer's cloud servers and application workloads.

Virtual Private Cloud.name: Virtual Private Cloud
Virtual Private Cloud.short_description: Virtual Private Cloud provides an isolated and configurable network environment on Huawei Cloud.
Virtual Private Cloud.definition: Virtual Private Cloud allows customers to create a logically isolated cloud network where they can define subnets, IP address ranges, routing, security groups, and connectivity options.
details: Virtual Private Cloud provides the foundational network layer for Huawei Cloud resources.
It enables secure communication between cloud resources and can be connected to on-premises environments when required.
VPC works with subnets, route tables, security groups, elastic IP addresses, and other networking components.
key_benefits: Customizable IP address ranges and subnets
Virtual Private Cloud.proposal_positioning: Virtual Private Cloud is proposed as the secure and isolated network foundation for the customer's Huawei Cloud environment.

Elastic IP.name: Elastic IP
Elastic IP.short_description: Elastic IP provides static public IP address connectivity for cloud resources.
Elastic IP.definition: Elastic IP is a public IP address service that enables cloud resources such as Elastic Cloud Server instances to communicate with the internet.
details: Elastic IP can be associated with supported Huawei Cloud resources to provide public network access.
It is commonly used for internet-facing applications, remote administration, public APIs, and external service access.
Elastic IP works with bandwidth options and network security controls.
key_benefits: Works with security groups and network controls
Elastic IP.proposal_positioning: Elastic IP is proposed to provide controlled internet connectivity for selected Huawei Cloud resources.

Object Storage Service.name: Object Storage Service
Object Storage Service.short_description: Object Storage Service provides scalable, durable, and secure object storage for unstructured data.
Object Storage Service.definition: Object Storage Service is a cloud storage service used to store objects such as files, images, backups, logs, documents, and application data.
details: Object Storage Service is suitable for storing large volumes of unstructured data.
It supports secure access control, lifecycle management, and scalable storage capacity.
OBS can be used by applications, backup systems, analytics platforms, and content delivery workflows.
key_benefits: Suitable for backup and archive use cases
Supports application data and content storage
Object Storage Service.proposal_positioning: Object Storage Service is proposed as the scalable object storage layer for files, backups, logs, and unstructured data.

Relational Database Service.name: Relational Database Service
Relational Database Service.short_description: Relational Database Service provides managed relational database capabilities on Huawei Cloud.
Relational Database Service.definition: Relational Database Service is a managed database service that helps customers deploy, operate, and maintain relational databases with reduced administrative overhead.
details: Relational Database Service supports managed database deployment and operation.
It can reduce the effort required for database provisioning, maintenance, backup, and monitoring.
RDS is suitable for enterprise applications, web platforms, transactional systems, and business applications.
Relational Database Service.proposal_positioning: Relational Database Service is proposed as the managed database layer for application and business data workloads.

Scalable File Service Turbo.name: Scalable File Service Turbo
Scalable File Service Turbo.short_description: Scalable File Service Turbo provides high-performance, shared file storage for enterprise workloads on Huawei Cloud.
Scalable File Service Turbo.definition: Scalable File Service Turbo is a managed, high-performance file storage service that provides shared file access for cloud servers and applications.
details: SFS Turbo provides scalable shared file storage with predictable performance.
It supports workloads that require concurrent file access from multiple compute instances.
The service integrates with Huawei Cloud compute and networking services.
key_benefits: Concurrent access from multiple cloud servers
Scalable File Service Turbo.proposal_positioning: Scalable File Service Turbo is proposed as the managed shared file storage layer for workloads requiring reliable, high-performance file access.

Cloud Backup and Recovery.name: Cloud Backup and Recovery
Cloud Backup and Recovery.short_description: Centralized backup and recovery for cloud and on-premises resources.
Cloud Backup and Recovery.definition: Centralized backup and recovery for cloud and on-premises resources.
details: The service is managed through Huawei Cloud and integrates with related cloud resources.
Configuration and capacity can be selected according to solution and workload requirements.
key_benefits: Integration with the wider Huawei Cloud platform
Flexible configuration aligned to workload requirements
Cloud Backup and Recovery.proposal_positioning: Cloud Backup and Recovery is included as part of the proposed Huawei Cloud solution.
